tools.name: unreal.ping
tools.description: Check connectivity with the Unreal Editor plugin.

tools.name: unreal.get_connection_status
tools.description: Return MCP server + Unreal transport status (optionally probes the Unreal plugin).

probe.description: If true, performs a ping/capabilities probe (default false).

tools.name: unreal.get_last_tool_error
tools.description: Retrieve the last bridge/plugin failure observed by this MCP server.

tools.name: unreal.cancel_current_operation
tools.description: Cancel an in-flight Unreal TCP request (best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.get_protocol_capabilities
tools.description: List supported MCP tools and Unreal plugin methods (if available).

tools.name: unreal.get_plugin_version
tools.description: Get UnstuckForUnreal plugin version (and bridge protocol version).

tools.name: unreal.get_active_debug_session
tools.description: Return the current debug session (if any).

tools.name: unreal.start_debug_session
tools.description: Begin a scoped debug session for correlating tool calls and evidence.

tools.name: unreal.end_debug_session
tools.description: End the current debug session and return a summary.

tools.name: unreal.clear_debug_session
tools.description: Clear the current debug session (drops accumulated evidence).

tools.name: unreal.get_editor_status
tools.description: Get Unreal Editor readiness and PIE state.

tools.name: unreal.get_engine_version
tools.description: Get Unreal Engine version string.

tools.name: unreal.get_current_project
tools.description: Get current project name and directory.

tools.name: unreal.get_project_info
tools.description: Alias for unreal.get_current_project.

tools.name: unreal.begin_transaction
tools.description: Begin an Unreal editor transaction (for safe write workflows).

tools.name: unreal.end_transaction
tools.description: End (commit) the active Unreal editor transaction.

tools.name: unreal.cancel_transaction
tools.description: Cancel (rollback) the active Unreal editor transaction.

tools.name: unreal.get_selected_actors
tools.description: Get currently selected actors in the editor.

tools.name: unreal.get_open_editors
tools.description: List assets that currently have an editor open (asset editors).

tools.name: unreal.get_open_asset_editors
tools.description: Alias for unreal.get_open_editors.

tools.name: unreal.get_active_blueprint
tools.description: Get the Blueprint currently being edited (best-effort: if multiple are open, returns a deterministic choice).

tools.name: unreal.get_current_level
tools.description: Get the active editor world and map.

tools.name: unreal.get_open_levels
tools.description: Get the persistent and streamed levels for the active editor world.

tools.name: unreal.get_selected_assets
tools.description: Get assets selected in the Content Browser.

tools.name: unreal.get_selected_components
tools.description: Get components currently selected in the editor.

tools.name: unreal.get_active_asset_editor
tools.description: Best-effort: get the currently active/focused asset editor.

tools.name: unreal.get_active_blueprint_graph
tools.description: Best-effort: get the currently active/focused Blueprint graph.

tools.name: unreal.get_selected_blueprint_nodes
tools.description: Best-effort: get selected nodes in the active Blueprint graph editor.

tools.name: unreal.get_focused_blueprint_node
tools.description: Best-effort: get the most relevant selected/focused Blueprint node.

tools.name: unreal.get_editor_viewport_state
tools.description: Get editor viewport camera transform and view mode (best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.get_world_outliner_selection
tools.description: Alias for unreal.get_selected_actors (Outliner selection).

tools.name: unreal.get_content_browser_path
tools.description: Get the current Content Browser path/folder (best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.get_editor_mode
tools.description: Get active editor mode(s) (Select, Landscape, etc).

tools.name: unreal.get_dirty_assets
tools.description: Get modified but unsaved packages/assets (best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.get_pending_editor_notifications
tools.description: Get pending editor notifications/modals (best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.get_message_log_summary
tools.description: Get a summary of Unreal Message Log categories (best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.get_component_tree
tools.description: Get the component tree for an actor (default: first selected actor; if actor_name is provided, will also search the current editor world).

actor_name.description: Optional actor name; if omitted uses first selected actor.

tools.name: unreal.list_assets
tools.description: List assets via the Asset Registry (no direct .uasset reads).

class.description: Optional UClass name filter, e.g. Blueprint, StaticMesh

recursive.description: Whether to recurse into subpaths (default true).

limit.description: Max number of results returned (default 200, max 2000).

name_contains.description: Optional substring filter on asset name.

tools.name: unreal.inspect_object
tools.description: Inspect a UObject (or Actor by name) using Unreal reflection (no direct .uasset reads).

actor_name.description: Actor name in the editor world (best-effort search).

name_contains.description: Only include properties whose name contains this substring.

tools.name: unreal.inspect_blueprint
tools.description: Inspect a Blueprint asset (variables, graphs, SCS components; optionally CDO properties).

include_cdo_properties.description: If true, also exports properties from the generated class CDO.

name_contains.description: Only include CDO properties whose name contains this substring.

use_active_if_missing.description: If no path is provided, uses the first open Blueprint editor asset if available (default true).

tools.name: unreal.get_blueprint_summary
tools.description: Compact overview of the Blueprint (best-effort; returns blueprint_found=false if none is available).

tools.name: unreal.get_blueprint_metadata
tools.description: Type, parent class, interfaces and status (best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.get_blueprint_parent_class
tools.description: Parent Blueprint or native class (best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.get_blueprint_interfaces
tools.description: Implemented interfaces (best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.get_blueprint_components
tools.description: Simple Construction Script components (best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.get_blueprint_component_tree
tools.description: Parent-child component hierarchy derived from SCS (best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.get_blueprint_variables
tools.description: Variables, types, defaults and flags (best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.get_blueprint_local_variables
tools.description: Locals belonging to a function (best-effort; currently returns empty).

tools.name: unreal.get_blueprint_functions
tools.description: Function names, inputs, outputs and flags (best-effort; signatures may be partial).

tools.name: unreal.get_blueprint_macros
tools.description: Macro definitions (best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.get_blueprint_event_dispatchers
tools.description: Dispatchers and signatures (best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.get_blueprint_timelines
tools.description: Timelines, tracks, lengths and settings (best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.get_blueprint_graphs
tools.description: All Event, function, macro and construction graphs (best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.get_blueprint_graph
tools.description: Structured nodes and connections for one graph (bounded; mode controls verbosity).

tools.name: unreal.get_blueprint_node
tools.description: Full information about one node (best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.get_blueprint_nodes
tools.description: Filtered list of graph nodes (best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.get_blueprint_node_pins
tools.description: Input/output pins and types for one node (best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.get_blueprint_node_connections
tools.description: Connections for one node (best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.get_blueprint_execution_flow
tools.description: Execution-pin graph only (best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.get_blueprint_data_flow
tools.description: Data-pin graph only (best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.get_blueprint_node_defaults
tools.description: Literal/default pin values (best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.get_blueprint_references
tools.description: Assets, classes and objects referenced (best-effort; currently returns empty).

tools.name: unreal.get_blueprint_dependencies
tools.description: Assets required by this Blueprint (AssetRegistry; best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.get_blueprint_dependents
tools.description: Assets that depend on this Blueprint (AssetRegistry; best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.get_blueprint_debug_object
tools.description: Current runtime instance being debugged (best-effort; currently returns null).

tools.name: unreal.get_blueprint_breakpoints
tools.description: Existing Blueprint breakpoints (best-effort; currently returns empty).

tools.name: unreal.get_blueprint_watches
tools.description: Watched pins and variables (best-effort; currently returns empty).

tools.name: unreal.get_blueprint_bookmarks
tools.description: Graph bookmarks (best-effort; currently returns empty).

tools.name: unreal.get_blueprint_compile_status
tools.description: Dirty, up-to-date, warning or error (best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.get_blueprint_class_defaults
tools.description: Class Default Object values (bounded; best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.get_blueprint_node_comment
tools.description: Comment associated with a node (best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.get_blueprint_graph_comments
tools.description: Comment boxes and contained nodes (best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.find_blueprint_nodes
tools.description: Search Blueprint graph nodes by title/class (best-effort).

graph.description: Graph name; if omitted uses the Blueprint's default graph.

all_graphs.description: If true, scans all graphs in the Blueprint (bounded).

max_graphs.description: Max graphs scanned when all_graphs=true (default 25, max 100).

tools.name: unreal.find_blueprint_events
tools.description: Locate overlap, input, tick and custom events (heuristic; best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.find_blueprint_function_calls
tools.description: Find calls to a particular function (heuristic; best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.find_blueprint_variable_reads
tools.description: Locate reads of a variable (heuristic; best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.find_blueprint_variable_writes
tools.description: Locate assignments to a variable (heuristic; best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.find_blueprint_component_references
tools.description: Find nodes targeting a component (heuristic; best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.find_blueprint_asset_references
tools.description: Find references to an asset (heuristic; best-effort).

asset_query.description: Substring match against pin default values and node title.

tools.name: unreal.find_blueprint_class_references
tools.description: Find usages of a class (heuristic; best-effort).

class_query.description: Substring match against pin types/defaults and node title.

tools.name: unreal.find_blueprint_unconnected_pins
tools.description: Locate unconnected pins (bounded; best-effort).

exec_only.description: If true, only consider exec pins.

data_only.description: If true, only consider non-exec pins.

tools.name: unreal.find_blueprint_dead_ends
tools.description: Execution paths with no continuation (heuristic; best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.find_blueprint_entry_points
tools.description: Events and externally called functions (heuristic; best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.find_blueprint_callers
tools.description: Find callers of a function or event (alias of find_blueprint_function_calls; best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.find_blueprint_implementations
tools.description: Find implementations of interface calls (best-effort; may be unimplemented).

tools.name: unreal.trace_blueprint_path
tools.description: Find a graph path between two nodes (bounded; best-effort).

max_steps.description: Max edges in the returned path (default 32, max 256).

tools.name: unreal.get_upstream_nodes
tools.description: Nodes that contribute to a pin/value (heuristic graph traversal; best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.get_downstream_nodes
tools.description: Nodes affected by a node/output (heuristic graph traversal; best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.get_node_neighbourhood
tools.description: Small graph around one node (bounded; best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.focus_blueprint_node
tools.description: Navigate the editor to a node (not yet implemented; placeholder tool).

tools.name: unreal.open_blueprint_graph
tools.description: Open and focus a graph (not yet implemented; placeholder tool).

tools.name: unreal.select_blueprint_nodes
tools.description: Select nodes for the user to inspect (not yet implemented; placeholder tool).

tools.name: unreal.compile_blueprint
tools.description: Compile one Blueprint without automatically saving.

tools.name: unreal.compile_selected_blueprint
tools.description: Compile the active Blueprint.

tools.name: unreal.compile_blueprints
tools.description: Compile several named Blueprints.

tools.name: unreal.compile_all_dirty_blueprints
tools.description: Compile modified Blueprint assets.

tools.name: unreal.get_compile_messages
tools.description: Errors, warnings and notes (from last captured compile).

tools.name: unreal.get_compile_message_details
tools.description: Full details for one diagnostic (from last captured compile).

message_id.description: Message id (e.g. m0) returned by compile tools.

tools.name: unreal.get_compile_error_nodes
tools.description: Map errors back to nodes (best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.get_compile_warning_nodes
tools.description: Map warnings back to nodes (best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.compile_and_capture_messages
tools.description: Compile and return normalized diagnostics.

tools.name: unreal.get_generated_class_status
tools.description: Check generated class availability.

tools.name: unreal.get_skeleton_class_status
tools.description: Inspect Blueprint skeleton class.

tools.name: unreal.get_blueprint_bytecode_summary
tools.description: Optional compiled execution summary (best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.get_last_successful_compile
tools.description: Last known clean compile (best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.compare_compile_results
tools.description: Compare before and after diagnostics (pure MCP-side diff).

before.description: Previous compile payload (as returned by compile tools).

after.description: New compile payload (as returned by compile tools).

tools.name: unreal.reinstance_blueprint
tools.description: Advanced recovery after recompilation (best-effort; may be unsupported).

tools.name: unreal.refresh_blueprint_nodes
tools.description: Refresh stale nodes (best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.reconstruct_blueprint_node
tools.description: Reconstruct a specific node (best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.validate_blueprint_asset
tools.description: Run asset validation (best-effort).

tools.name: unreal.validate_blueprint_dependencies
tools.description: Detect missing or broken dependencies (best-effort).
